title: Figure 4 from: Xu R-F, Karunarathna SC, Hyde KD, Phukhamsakda C, Rapior S, Dai D-Q, Wang M-M, Ali S, Yang J-Y, Kakumyan P, Tibpromma S (2026) Screening and identification of fungal species associated with early-stage deterioration of natural rubber. description: Figure 4 Schiff's reagent staining of natural rubber showing oxidative surface changes. a1–a5. After 2 months of incubation, the rubber discs were washed and dried; b1–b5. Rubber discs stained with Schiff's reagent; c1–c5. The stained area observed under magnification.
